name: sandbox-hotel-monorepo
description: Sandbox Hotel brochure repo - web, brochure API, and shared utilities. PMS authority lives in sandbox-pms.

scripts.dev: npm run guard:pms-authority && npm run dev -w packages/web
scripts.deploy: npm run guard:pms-authority && npm run deploy -w packages/web
scripts.build: npm run guard:pms-authority && npm run build -w packages/web
scripts.dev:all: npm run guard:pms-authority && npm run dev --workspaces
scripts.test:booking-links: npm run guard:pms-authority && npm run test:booking-links -w packages/web
